# Yacolt Burn Experience 2026

Annual full-day mountain bike shuttle event in the Yacolt Burn State Forest, southwest Washington.

## Event Details
- Date: Saturday, June 20, 2026
- Time: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Location: Yacolt Burn Trailhead, Yacolt, WA 98675
- Capacity: 299 riders (sells out annually)
- Registration closes: June 19, 2026

## Registration
- Evergreen members: $35 (online pre-event)
- Non-members: $60 (online pre-event)
- Day-of: $70
- Register: https://www.evergreenmtb.org/component/civicrm?task=civicrm/event/info&reset=1&id=5398

## What's Included
All-day shuttles (9am–4pm), demo bike fleet (Propain and Norco), food, raffles, vendors, organized youth ride (ages 3–12).

## The Experience
Shuttles load at the lower Yacolt Burn Trailhead and drop riders at Five Corners, gateway to the upper trail system. Riders descend, reload, and repeat all day.

## History
The Yacolt Burn area takes its name from a Klickitat word meaning "haunted valley'. On September 11, 1902, a firestorm consumed 238,920 acres. The area was rehabilitated over decades and mountain bikers began riding the logging roads in the late 1990s. The Yacolt Burn Experience launched in 2021.

## Organizer
Evergreen Mountain Bike Alliance Southwest Chapter
https://www.evergreenmtb.org/chapters/southwest

## 2026 Sponsors
Gold: Norco
Silver: Propain Bikes, PNW Components, Crankbrothers, Cushcore, Camas Bikes, Formula 100, Evo Portland
Bronze: Gravity Cartel / Spank, Red Bull, SRAM, DT Swiss, Kenda, All City Print, You Move Me, Pull Caffè Coffee Roasters, Frito Lay
